hiddenTeaser: Hidden achievement. Keep writing to reveal it.

creative_tears.title: Writer's Tears
creative_tears.desc: Wrote a scene that brought tears to your own eyes

creative_laugh.title: Laugh Through Tears
creative_laugh.desc: Wrote a scene that you find funny yourself

creative_twist.title: Eureka!
creative_twist.desc: Came up with a twist that surprised you

creative_perfect_word.title: The Perfect Word
creative_perfect_word.desc: Found just the right word or phrase

creative_farewell.title: Farewell
creative_farewell.desc: Parted with a character you grew attached to

creative_permission.title: Permission to Suck
creative_permission.desc: Deliberately wrote 'bad' text and moved on

feat_flow.title: Flow
feat_flow.desc: An hour of writing without a break

ultra_novel.title: A Whole Book
ultra_novel.desc: Half a million characters — that's a full novel. You wrote a book.

ultra_lifetime.title: A Piece of Your Life
ultra_lifetime.desc: 100 hours alone with your story — weeks of pure creation you gave to your book.

ultra_year.title: A Year on the Road
ultra_year.desc: A year ago — your first characters. Look back at how far you've come. You didn't quit.

ultra_from_nothing.title: From Nothing
ultra_from_nothing.desc: 250 times you sat down to write. Each one felt small. Together they built all of this.

ultra_cut.title: The Courage to Cut
ultra_cut.desc: Tens of thousands of characters deleted — not a loss, but the courage to cut for something better.

ultra_capstone.title: Look Back
ultra_capstone.desc: {{symbols}} characters · {{days}} days · {{hours}} hours · {{books}} books. This isn't trying anymore. This is you.

flavor.projects_1: Your first book is done. Most people only dream — you did it.
flavor.projects_2: Three books already. Not a fluke — it's how you live now.
flavor.projects_3: Number five. Seems like nothing can stop you now.
flavor.projects_4: Ten books. That makes you a writer. No quotes needed.
flavor.volume_7: A million characters. Do you grasp how much that is? A whole shelf.
flavor.volume_8: 2.5 million. This isn't a hobby — it's a library with your name on it.
flavor.volume_9: Five million characters. Sit down. Let it sink in: you're a story machine.
